## 1. Person aggregate definition and amendable fields

**Primary file:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/Person.cs`

`Person` is a sealed aggregate root (not a full DDD aggregate with events, but the golden population-register record). Key fields:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `Id` | `PersonId` | Strongly typed GUID |
| `GivenName`, `FamilyName` | `string` | Identity |
| `BirthDate` | `DateOnly` | Identity |
| `Nationality` | `string` | Identity |
| `LinkedRegisterRecordId` | `NationalRegisterPersonId?` | Link to NR seed record |
| `BisNumber` | `BisNumber?` | Temporary register number |
| `NationalRegisterNumber` | `NationalRegisterNumber?` | Assigned at registration confirm |
| `CivilStatus` | `CivilStatusRecord?` | Owned value object |
| `BirthPlace`, `BirthCountry` | `string?` | Birth evidence |
| `DomicileAddress` | `BelgianAddress?` | Current domicile |

**Key methods:**

```csharp
public static Person Create(IdentityDetails details)
public static Person CreateFromRegisterRecord(NationalRegisterPerson registerPerson)
public void Update(IdentityDetails details)                    // name + birthDate + nationality
public void RecordCivilStatus(CivilStatusDetails details)      // replaces entire civil status
public void RecordBirthInformation(BirthInformationDetails details)
public void UpdateDomicile(BelgianAddress address)
public void AssignNationalRegisterNumber(NationalRegisterNumber nationalRegisterNumber)
public void ConvertBisToNationalRegister(NationalRegisterNumber nationalRegisterNumber)
```

**Supporting value types:**
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/IdentityDetails.cs` — `(GivenName, FamilyName, BirthDate, Nationality)`
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/CivilStatusDetails.cs` — `(Status, SpouseGivenName, SpouseFamilyName, MarriageDate, MarriagePlace, MarriageRecognitionStatus)`
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/PersonId.cs` — `readonly record struct PersonId(Guid Value)`

**What can be amended today:**

| Field group | Mutation path | When allowed |
|-------------|---------------|--------------|
| **Name + nationality + birth date** | `Person.Update(IdentityDetails)` via `RegistrationCase.CorrectIdentity()` | Only during intake: case status `Intake` or `UnderReview` |
| **Civil status** | `Person.RecordCivilStatus(CivilStatusDetails)` via `RecordCivilStatusHandler` | Same intake window (`EnsureIntakeDataEditable`) |
| **Domicile** | `Person.UpdateDomicile()` | At registration confirm or change-of-address confirm |
| **NR number** | `AssignNationalRegisterNumber` / `ConvertBisToNationalRegister` | One-time at confirm or BIS conversion |

**No post-registration amendment workflow exists yet.** Phase 17 (`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/docs/phases/phase-17-post-registration-amendments.md`) plans `RegisterAmendmentCase` for name/civil status/nationality changes after `Registered`.

**Intake correction entry points:**
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/RegistrationCase.cs` — `CorrectIdentity(Person person, IdentityDetails identity)` (lines 160–173)
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/CorrectIdentity/CorrectIdentityHandler.cs` — `Handle(RegistrationCaseId, RecordIdentityRequest, CancellationToken)`
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/RecordCivilStatus/RecordCivilStatusHandler.cs` — `Handle(RegistrationCaseId, RecordCivilStatusRequest, CancellationToken)`

**EF mapping:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/PersonConfiguration.cs` — table `persons`, `CivilStatus` as owned entity.

## 2. Audit / history patterns

### `CaseAuditEntry` (case-scoped audit trail)

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/CaseAuditEntry.cs` | Entity |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/CaseAuditEntryId.cs` | ID type |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/CaseAuditAction.cs` | Action enum |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/ICaseAuditRepository.cs` | Repository interface |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories/CaseAuditRepository.cs` | Implementation |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/CaseAuditRecorder.cs` | `RecordAsync(RegistrationCaseId, CaseAuditAction, string? details, CancellationToken)` |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/ListCaseAudit/ListCaseAuditHandler.cs` | Query by case |

**`CaseAuditEntry` fields:** `Id`, `CaseId`, `Action`, `OfficerId`, `OccurredAt`, `Details`

**`CaseAuditAction` values:**
```
CaseOpened, IdentityRecorded, IdentityCorrected, ResidenceCategorySet,
AddressDeclared, PoliceVerificationRequested, PoliceResultRecorded,
CaseApproved, CaseRejected, CaseSuspended, CaseResumed,
RegistrationConfirmed, CertificateIssued, CaseAssigned,
CaseLockReleased, DuplicateInvestigationResolved
```

**Important gap:** `IdentityRecorded` and `IdentityCorrected` are defined in the enum but **not yet recorded** by `RecordIdentityHandler` or `CorrectIdentityHandler`. Only handlers like `ConfirmRegistrationHandler`, `ApproveCaseHandler`, `RejectCaseHandler`, etc. call `CaseAuditRecorder`.

### `PersonAmendmentLog`

**Does not exist** in the codebase. Phase 17 proposes either extending `CaseAuditEntry` or introducing `PersonAmendmentLog`.

### Person file history (aggregated, read-only)

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/PersonFile/IPersonFileQuery.cs` | `PersonHistoryEvent`, `PersonAddressHistoryEntry` records |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Queries/PersonFileQuery.cs` | `ListHistoryEventsAsync(PersonId)` — aggregates registration audit entries + birth/CoA/document/certificate events |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/PersonFile/GetPersonFile/GetPersonFileHandler.cs` | Exposes history as `PersonFileHistoryEventDto` |

`PersonHistoryEvent` shape: `(Title, Timestamp, Description, Source)` — built from `CaseAuditEntries` for all registration cases linked to the person, plus workflow-specific events from other case types.

---

## 3. How registered persons are identified

### Registration case lifecycle

**File:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/RegistrationCaseStatus.cs`

```csharp
public enum RegistrationCaseStatus
{
    Intake, AwaitingPoliceVerification, UnderReview, Approved,
    Registered, Rejected, Suspended
}
```

**Registration → Registered transition** in `RegistrationCase.ConfirmRegistration()`:

```csharp
public RegistrationConfirmedEventDetails ConfirmRegistration(DateTimeOffset confirmedAt)
// Sets Status = RegistrationCaseStatus.Registered, requires PersonId and SelectedRegisterTarget
```

**Handler:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/ConfirmRegistration/ConfirmRegistrationHandler.cs` — also assigns NR number and domicile to `Person`.

### `PersonId` links

`RegistrationCase` holds `PersonId?` — set by:
- `RecordIdentity(IdentityDetails)` → creates new `Person`, sets `PersonId`
- `LinkExistingPerson(NationalRegisterPerson)` → creates `Person` from NR record

Other workflows also reference `PersonId`:
- `ChangeOfAddressCase.PersonId`
- `BirthDeclarationCase.ChildPersonId` / `ParentLinks`
- `DocumentRequestCase.PersonId`
- `CertificateRequest.PersonId`
- `OutboundNotification.PersonId`

### Queries for "is this person registered?"

| Location | Pattern |
|----------|---------|
| `RegistrationCaseRepository.GetLatestRegisteredByPersonIdAsync(PersonId)` | `c.PersonId == personId && c.Status == Registered` |
| `PersonFileQuery.GetRegisterTargetAsync(PersonId)` | Same filter, returns `SelectedRegisterTarget` |
| `ResolveRegisteredPersonHandler` | Requires linked `Person` with `NationalRegisterNumber` |
| `IssueHouseholdCompositionHandler` | Requires `registrationCase.Status == Registered` |
| `SearchPersonFileHandler` | Enriches NR search hits with `PersonId` via `GetByRegisterRecordIdAsync` / `GetByNationalRegisterNumberAsync` |

**Registered person resolution** (`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/IdentityDocuments/ResolveRegisteredPerson/ResolveRegisteredPersonHandler.cs`):

```csharp
public async Task<ResolveRegisteredPersonResponse> Handle(
    ResolveRegisteredPersonRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
// Throws if person not in population register or lacks NR number
```

**Repository:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/IPersonRepository.cs` — lookup by `PersonId`, `NationalRegisterPersonId`, or `NationalRegisterNumber`.

## 4. `CivilStatus` enum

**File:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/CivilStatus.cs`

```csharp
public enum CivilStatus
{
    Single = 0,
    Married = 1,
    Divorced = 2,
    Widowed = 3,
    Separated = 4,
    RegisteredPartnership = 5
}
```

**Owned record:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/CivilStatusRecord.cs`

```csharp
public CivilStatus Status { get; }
public string? SpouseGivenName, SpouseFamilyName { get; }
public DateOnly? MarriageDate { get; }
public string? MarriagePlace { get; }
public MarriageRecognitionStatus MarriageRecognitionStatus { get; }
public CivilStatus EffectiveRegisterStatus { get; }  // Single if foreign marriage pending recognition
public static CivilStatusRecord Create(CivilStatusDetails details)
public static bool RequiresMarriageDetails(CivilStatus status)  // Married or RegisteredPartnership
```

**Related enum:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Identity/MarriageRecognitionStatus.cs` — `NotApplicable`, `Recognised`, `PendingRecognition`

**API DTO:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/GetRegistrationCase/RegistrationCaseDetailDto.cs` — `CivilStatusDto(Status, EffectiveRegisterStatus, SpouseGivenName, ...)`

---

## Summary for Phase 17 planning

- **Person** is the golden record; identity fields mutate via `Update()`, civil status via `RecordCivilStatus()` (full replacement, not delta).
- **Intake corrections** already work for name/nationality/birth date (`CorrectIdentity`) and civil status (`RecordCivilStatus`), gated by `EnsureIntakeDataEditable`.
- **Audit** is case-centric (`CaseAuditEntry`); person history is a projection. `IdentityRecorded`/`IdentityCorrected` audit actions exist but are not wired up yet. No `PersonAmendmentLog`.
- **Registered** = `RegistrationCaseStatus.Registered` + `PersonId` link + (typically) assigned `NationalRegisterNumber` at confirm.
